description: Eval prompt suite for autotune-ollama. Reference answers are pre-generated by Claude Opus.
note: Prompt content is placeholder — define actual prompts in a follow-up session.

coding_prompts.prompt: Write a Python function that implements a trie data structure with insert, search, and prefix-match methods. Include type hints and handle edge cases.

Write a bash script that monitors a directory for new CSV files and loads them into a SQLite database. The script should: detect new files using inotifywait, infer column names from CSV headers, create tables if they don't exist, and handle errors gracefully.

Implement an async rate limiter in Python using asyncio that supports: token bucket algorithm, configurable rate and burst size, and a decorator for rate-limiting async functions. Include proper error handling.

chat_prompts.prompt: I have a Rails app with N+1 queries on the index page. Walk me through how to diagnose and fix this using includes vs joins. Explain the trade-offs of each approach.

Compare the trade-offs of SQLite vs PostgreSQL for a self-hosted app with 10 concurrent users. Consider: write concurrency, deployment complexity, backup strategies, and when to migrate from one to the other.

A Python web service's memory usage grows linearly over time, eventually getting OOM-killed. It uses FastAPI, SQLAlchemy, and Redis. Walk me through a systematic debugging approach to find and fix the memory leak.
